title: Diamond Nuggets
description: There's iron and gold nuggets, why not diamond nuggets? (Forge/Fabric)
body:
## Diamond Nuggets
### For Forge and Fabric

---
Ever had a shop on a server but 1 diamond is too much for the price?

This mod is for you! You can now use Diamond Nuggets to trade instead!

---
#### Crafting and Obtaining
Just as you would expect, one Diamond can be crafted into 9 Diamond Nuggets.

9 Diamond Nuggets can be crafted into one Diamond.

You can smelt Diamond Armor and Tools in a Blast Furnace to obtain Diamond Nuggets. (v1.3+)


![Image of the Diamond Nugget](https://i.imgur.com/fhFLEL9.png)
---
_Feel free to use this in your modpack, a link to this page is not required but appreciated._
